name: Mint Chutney
servings: makes enough for 4–6 as an accompaniment
intro: This is probably the most popular chutney served in Indian restaurants. Some chefs add a little food colouring to make it bright green.

ingredients.item: bird’s-eye green chillies, to taste, very finely chopped
commercial mint sauce of your choice, to taste

method: Place the ingredients in a mixing bowl and whisk to combine until smooth. Cover and place in the fridge for at least 30 minutes, before serving.
